text_block_list.text: Narita Brian and I are visiting a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do we really need to ask the gods for help at
this point?

I've been worried about Narita Brian's condition
recently, so I tell her that I'd like to pray for her
health.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...You know, it's my responsibility to take care of
myself. Not the gods' or Buddha's.
choice_data_list: I just want to do whatever I can.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Fine, if you're going to insist.
I pray for Narita Brian's speedy recovery.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I didn't pray for anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I just went along with it to make you feel better.
choice_data_list: Sorry to make you do that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No matter. It's just a difference in customs. But, I
will say this...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're the only one in charge of your own body.
Victory is something you've got to take for
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's not the gods that are going to answer your
prayers...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. If you got it, then let's go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Although... I have to admit, there is a nice breeze
here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling pretty good. How about a quick run
before going back?

Perhaps it's just the nice change of pace, but
Narita Brian seems to have a spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh... The wind smells damp...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't like it...
Rumble, rumble... Drip drop...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Agh! It's raining!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch! Let's hurry back!
Perhaps we displeased the gods?

Drenched by the rain, Narita Brian doesn't say
another word the whole way back.
